---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing agent or the system
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Agent or Component

Which agent or component does this affect?

## Problem

What problem does this solve or what gap does it fill?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.
